formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:
Here's a JSON array of formulas for CBSE Class 12 Business Studies - Planning.

```json
[
  {
    "name": "SWOT Analysis",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to assess internal and external factors affecting a business"
  },
  {
    "name": "Pareto Analysis",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Vital Few vs. Trivial Many",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to identify key factors causing the majority of problems"
  },
  {
    "name": "McKinsey 7S Framework",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Strategy, Structure, Systems, Skills, Style, Staff, Shared Values",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to analyze and align internal and external factors of an organization"
  },
  {
    "name": "Porter's Five Forces Model",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Threat of New Entrants, Bargaining Power of Suppliers, Bargaining Power of Buyers, Threat of Substitutes, Rivalry Among Competitors",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to analyze the competitive forces in an industry"
  },
  {
    "name": "BCG Matrix",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Market Growth Rate, Relative Market Share",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to categorize business segments based on their growth rates and market shares"
  },
  {
    "name": "Ansoff Growth Matrix",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Market Penetration, Market Development, Product Development, Diversification",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to identify business growth strategies"
  },
  {
    "name": "PERT (Program Evaluation and Review Technique)",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Critical Path, Critical Path Method, Expected Time, Variance",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to plan and manage complex projects"
  },
  {
    "name": "PERT Chart",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Activities, Events, Dependencies, Sequence",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to visualize and schedule project activities"
  }
]
```
Note: As the chapter Planning in Business Studies is more focused on concepts and models rather than mathematical formulas, the list above includes key statements/laws in the same format.
